code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut cur = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if in_tok
        if idx % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(out)
            out = cur
          else
            out = "#{out} #{cur}"
          end
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        cur = ""
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_tok = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
